report.summary: Day 62 standup v18: FOMC Day 1 underway — decision tomorrow 2pm ET. Full 6/6 rotation since v17. Build cycle added Initia ecosystem + Crypto Custody Guide 2026 (2 new pages, queue refilled to 2). Publish-v11 promoted Maple Finance + On-Chain Institutional Credit (now live in published-pages.ts). Design-v11 audited 7 ecosystem pages — OG images, a11y, mobile responsiveness improved on 4. Community-v15 drafted 6 FOMC-themed social posts + 3 SVG cards. EOD-v14 QA clean. Published: 411 entries / 397 unique slugs. 1,084 page.tsx files. F&G recovering to 42-47 (from ATL 5). BTC $73,931, ETH $2,317 (+17% 7d). ETF 6-day inflow streak $963M. Git locks still blocking — 607+ uncommitted files.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v17 Standup
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $73,931 (+3.8% 24h), failed to sustain $74,450 resistance. ETH $2,317 (+17% 7d, +8.45% 24h) — strongest weekly move since November. Overall crypto market +3.6%.

SENTIMENT SHIFT: F&G recovering rapidly — CoinMarketCap 47, CoinStats 42, from ATL 5 on Feb 6. 38-day extreme fear streak broken. Altcoin Season Index trending up. First time above 40 since early February.

ETF FLOWS: 6-day inflow streak (longest since October). $199.4M net inflow today. $962.8M cumulative since Mar 9. BlackRock + Fidelity leading. First potential positive monthly flow since October. Net AUM ~$91.8B.

FOMC: Day 1 of 2-day meeting underway. Decision + dot plot tomorrow Mar 18 at 2pm ET. 92%+ hold probability at 3.50-3.75%. Key: dot plot — December showed 2 cuts, new data (oil briefly $119, tariffs 15%, payrolls -92K, GDP 0.7% Q4) may reduce. Powell's second-to-last meeting before Warsh succession May 23.

CONTENT PIPELINE: Build cycle added Initia ($300M+ TVL, Cosmos-based L1 modular rollup orchestration) + Crypto Custody Guide 2026 (institutional focus, Fireblocks $6T+, Coinbase Custody). Both queued for Day 64 publish.
PUBLISHED_PAGES: 411 entries / 397 unique slugs (14 dupes). Maple Finance + On-Chain Credit promoted this cycle. PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Initia + Crypto Custody). Total page.tsx files: 1,084.

GSC WINDOW: Day 18+ since site verification. First production deploy (e999560) went live last cycle — 20 days of accumulated content now indexable. Organic impressions expected within 48-72h for newly deployed pages.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v17
items: FULL ROTATION (6/6 agents) since v17: build (Initia + Custody) + publish-v11 (Maple + Credit promoted) + design-v11 (7 pages audited, 4 polished) + community-v15 (6 FOMC posts + 3 SVGs) + eod-v14 (QA clean) + standup-v18. Today total: 83 reports.

SHIPPED this cycle: Maple Finance + On-Chain Credit moved to PUBLISHED_PAGES; Initia + Crypto Custody Guide built and queued; 4 ecosystem pages got OG images + a11y fixes + mobile improvements (Yearn, Babylon, Usual, Odos); FOMC Day 1 social campaign ready; EOD QA passed.

BLOCKER [P0] Git locks persist: HEAD.lock + index.lock still present (~31h+ stale). 607+ uncommitted files AFTER the e999560 deploy. All new work (Initia, Custody, design refactors, community assets, Maple/Credit publish) accumulating uncommitted. Another deploy gap growing.

BLOCKER [P0] Rate limiter: 0/6 core API routes — 27th+ consecutive standup. FOMC decision TOMORROW 2pm ET. Post-FOMC BTC volatility historically 3-5x normal API traffic. /api/defi-yields has NO fallback data — returns 500 on failure.
CARRY-OVER [P1] PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Initia + Crypto Custody) for Day 64 promote.
CARRY-OVER [P1] 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx — will 404.
CARRY-OVER [P1] 14 duplicate slug entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES.
CARRY-OVER [P2] 42 TS errors in 2 files (non-blocking). Vercel Pro trial ~7 days remaining (add payment before Mar 25).
CARRY-OVER [P2] /ecosystem/maple-finance is client component — inherits parent layout metadata only (no page-specific SEO).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND COMMIT: 31h+ of accumulated work is uncommitted. Commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit -m 'Day 62+: Initia, Crypto Custody, Maple/Credit publish, ecosystem UX polish, FOMC campaign' && git push. The FOMC decision is in <24h — get current code deployed before the volatility spike drives traffic.

PRIORITY 2 — WIRE RATE LIMITERS before FOMC announcement (Mar 18 2pm ET). This is the 27th+ standup flagging this. Post-FOMC BTC moves historically trigger 3-5x API traffic. /api/defi-yields also needs fallback data (currently returns 500 on failure). All 6 API routes are unprotected.

PRIORITY 3 — PROMOTE Initia + Crypto Custody from PUBLISH_QUEUE (Day 64 batch → 399 unique slugs). Then continue build pipeline: institutional DeFi and custody are hot 2026 narratives. Sentiment recovery (F&G 42-47) means retail interest is coming back — have content ready.

STRATEGIC CONTEXT: The market inflection is here. F&G jumped from ATL 5 → 47 in 5 weeks. ETH +17% 7d. ETF 6-day inflow streak. FOMC dot plot tomorrow could be the catalyst for a sustained rally or a correction. Either way, traffic spikes. degen0x needs to be deployed, rate-limited, and indexed. The 20-day deploy gap was closed last cycle — now maintain daily commit cadence. Every hour of uncommitted work is risk.

metrics.label: Agents That Ran This Cycle
metrics.value: 6 of 6 (build + publish-v11 + design-v11 + community-v15 + eod-v14 + standup-v18)
